name: TC-TXN-003 — Summary: Custom date range (2026-01-01 → 2026-05-22)
description:
Verifies the GET /summary endpoint with period=custom and explicit date range.

**Endpoint:** GET /api/v1/transaction/summary
**Params:** period=custom, from_date=2026-01-01, to_date=2026-05-22
**Expected:** HTTP 200 with valid summary data for the specified date range.

Validates flexible date-range filtering used for custom reporting periods.
descriptionHtml:
Verifies the GET /summary endpoint with period=custom and explicit date range.

Endpoint: GET /api/v1/transaction/summary
Params: period=custom, from_date=2026-01-01, to_date=2026-05-22
Expected: HTTP 200 with valid summary data for the specified date range.

Validates flexible date-range filtering used for custom reporting periods.
